codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: `downloadBlob` and `openNewAppWindow` were extracted into dedicated services, imports were updated at call sites/tests, `services/tauri.ts` no longer contains those utilities, and `tauri.test.ts` now explicitly verifies both browser (HTTP) and Tauri (invoke) branches for `loadFile`, `compareFiles`, and `saveComparisonSnapshot`.

The change is complete and aligned with expected behavior; no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified.
